scenarios.title: Python Agent Frameworks
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks that use or modify the OpenAI Agents Python SDK, the openai-agents package, or the agents import module.
scenarios.role: Provides self-contained routing and workflow guidance for building, debugging, and maintaining OpenAI Agents Python SDK applications.
scenarios.read_when: User mentions openai-agents, OpenAI Agents SDK Python, agents.Agent, Runner, RunConfig, function_tool, handoff, guardrails, sessions, MCP, realtime agents, SandboxAgent, tracing, or this repository.
scenarios.best_for: Creating agent workflows, configuring tools/handoffs/guardrails, choosing sessions and model providers, integrating MCP/realtime/sandbox/tracing, or editing this SDK repository safely.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is about the JavaScript/TypeScript Agents SDK, direct low-level OpenAI API calls without the SDK, or generic agent design that does not use this package.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `openai-agents-python` when the practical repository usage scenario is Python SDK agent application work or repository maintenance for openai-agents-python; route inside the skill by SDK surface rather than reading all sub-skills.
